citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
During inspection, APHIS Officials asked the facility representative on several occasions if flea preventives had been
applied to the coatimundis. The facility representative stated that they had not treated the coatimundis with flea
preventative. APHIS Officials contacted the Attending Veterinarian (AV) and discussed the medical notes. The AV stated
the guidance given was to place all coatimundis on Revolution Plus. Furthermore, per the medical records, the AV
recommended Revolution Plus for all coatimundis as a flea preventative, but the facility has not provided that treatment.
The licensee, in conjunction with a veterinarian, must use appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat
diseases and injuries, and must determine the availability of emergency, weekend, and holiday care.
Correct by April 17, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with Facility Representative.
Additional Inspectors:
Sarah Roloff, CS n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
During inspection, APHIS Officials asked the facility representative on several occasions if flea preventives had been 
applied to the coatimundis. The facility representative stated that they had not treated the coatimundis with flea 
preventative. APHIS Officials contacted the Attending Veterinarian (AV) and discussed the medical notes. The AV stated 
the guidance given was to place all coatimundis on Revolution Plus. Furthermore, per the medical records, the AV 
recommended Revolution Plus for all coatimundis as a flea preventative, but the facility has not provided that treatment. 
The licensee, in conjunction with a veterinarian, must use appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat 
diseases and injuries, and must determine the availability of emergency, weekend, and holiday care.  
 
Correct by April 17, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with Facility Representative. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Sarah Roloff, CS n
